programme.title: Cub Camp S1 Ep02
programme.desc: Welcome sisters Xiba, Xyla, and Xola, a trio of starving orphans who turn Winston's world upside down before gentle Xola teaches him a lesson about friendship.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters S1 Ep04
programme.desc: In an extraordinary story of love and betrayal, a young lion cub is cast out from the pride for being the runt of the litter.

programme.title: Land of Primates S1 Ep06
programme.desc: Enter the wilds of South Africa to get an intimate look into one of the continent's most misunderstood primates. Like humans, these primates have unique personalities.

programme.title: America's Wild Ss S1 Ep01
programme.desc: It's spring: the season of courtship and new life. Witness nature awaken from its slumber in many forms, from the blossoms that explode in the rain-soaked desert of Arizona to the fuzzy wood ducklings that leap from their nests.

programme.title: America's Wild Ss S1 Ep02
programme.desc: Summer brings long, warm days for wildlife to thrive. Watch animals learn new skills, compete for mates, and escape predators as they try to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: Wildlife ER S1 Ep05
programme.desc: Wade into recovery mode as the clinic deals with the animal aftermath of a Brisbane flood. Meet a baby kangaroo in need of round-the-clock care and a plover washed down a drain.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit S1 Ep04
programme.desc: Dive into tight spaces, underneath hot houses, and into tense rescue situations as the catchers confront a six-foot-long, highly venomous brown snake. Then watch Stu and Liv relocate a coastal python threatening the safety of a homeowner's pets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters S1 Ep06
programme.desc: Freeze time as water becomes a force of change in Earth's most frigid ecosystems. Hunt for unsuspecting seals with polar bears, and try out a unique survival strategy with Arctic foxes.

programme.title: Airborne S1 Ep01
programme.desc: Watch beginners make their first leap into the air, like an Andean condor who must attend flight school before spreading its wings. Meet oddballs who soar without feathers and marvel at a peregrine falcon's speed as it dives to catch its prey.

programme.title: Airborne S1 Ep02
programme.desc: Go hunting with flyers who excel at making mid-air catches. Watch the metamorphosis of the acrobatic emperor dragonfly, admire the barn owl's stealthy approach to prey, and catch a wandering salamander's death-defying leap into the abyss.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters S1 Ep05
programme.desc: Adolescence isn't easy for lions. Learning how to hunt and establishing one's place amongst the pride are just two of the challenges young felines have to face.

programme.title: Land of Primates S1 Ep07
programme.desc: The baboon is one of the world's most successful and dominant primates. Ranging throughout Africa, we explore how these fascinating animals have adapted to thrive in the wild.
